steps: Transfect the DNA in cells using polyethylenimine (Polysciences).
After 48- to 72-hour expression, harvest the cells.
Follow the Strep-Tactin batch purification by Size Exclusion Chromatography.
Incubate the supernatant with Strep-Tactin Sepharose resin at 4 °C with gentle shaking for 03:00:00 , apply to a gravity column, and wash extensively with Wash Buffer.
Elute the protein of interest with Elution Buffer and then apply onto a Superdex 200 column (16/60 prep grade) pre-equilibrated in SEC Buffer at 4 °C .
Pool and concentrate the peak fractions containing pure protein, snap-frozen in liquid nitrogen and store at -80 °C .
Resuspend the cell pellet in Lysis Buffer and clear at 16000 rpm, °C, at 4 °C for 01:00:00 .
creator: Chunmei Chang
